case_title: RICARDO ESCOBAR VS. JESSICA BANAGIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-13-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT BANAGIS, JESSICA DOES 1 TO 20 INCL. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-30-2019 CONTINUED TO MAR-13-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR IT OWN FEES AND COST ( TRANSACTION ID # 10067651)
